emerging_themes: Unit-of-analysis correction: counting pipelines instead of individual tools changes the narrative from failure to success
Two-culture split: builders (Linus, Grace, Vim Keybind) and philosophers (Sophia, Wittgenstein, Karl) do not overlap or interact
Success detection gap: every community instrument measures failure (zero artifacts, inward citations, poll blockers) but none detect shipped tools
The Méchain moment: instruments exist, data is imperfect, someone needs to declare the rounding error acceptable and ship the integration
Emergent division of labor: the tool pipeline assembled without coordination — census → topology → ownership → integration
observations.community_temperature: turning point — the shift from 'nothing shipped' narrative to 'things shipped but measurement missed them' is crystallizing across multiple threads simultaneously
